ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the image */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug for SEO-friendly URLs */,
  "url" TEXT /* Direct URL link to the image */,
  "image" TEXT /* File path to the stored image on the server */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the image */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "total_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes the image has received */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL for a thumbnail version of the image */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the image */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting (public, private, unlisted) */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the image */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments for the image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content creator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the image */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the like is active (e.g., if the user has unliked the image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_category_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_relations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_relations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES image_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is active (e.g., if the comment has been deleted or hidden) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_comments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the image */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the view was recorded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the view is active (e.g., if the view has been invalidated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_views_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_upload_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., uploaded, edited) */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was recorded */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., changes made during an edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_upload_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_upload_history_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("id")
)
